name: Legal / warranty
description: Cases, receipts, correspondence, deadlines, and proof.
purpose: Keep proof-bearing case material, receipts, correspondence, deadlines, and decisions organized with provenance.
audience: People managing warranties, returns, disputes, insurance claims, legal matters, contracts, or other proof-heavy records.
beginner_description: Use this for receipts, warranties, disputes, insurance, contracts, deadlines, and case files.
agent_instructions: Treat proof-bearing material as evidence when it supports a case, claim, warranty, insurance issue, dispute, or record. Preserve provenance, cite originals, and avoid converting every ordinary source into evidence.

suggested_workflows.title: Save proof for a case
suggested_workflows.intent: Preserve a receipt, document, message, or artifact as proof for a specific matter.
suggested_workflows.route: preserve or upload to Evidence, then link or note the case context
suggested_workflows.example: Save this receipt for the laptop warranty case.

suggested_workflows.title: Show case evidence
suggested_workflows.intent: Retrieve the proof and source trail for a dispute, warranty, claim, or contract question.
suggested_workflows.route: find evidence and compiled case notes, then get selected pages for citations
suggested_workflows.example: Show the evidence for the landlord dispute.

examples: Save this receipt for the laptop warranty case.
Show the evidence for the landlord dispute.
